questions.question: Describe the main difference between a combinational logic circuit and a sequential logic circuit. (10 marks)
Design a 4-bit binary adder using only NOT, AND, and OR gates. Show the truth table and the logic diagram. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Use a software tool to draw the logic diagram

questions.question: What is the truth table for a 3-to-1 multiplexer with A=0, A=1, B=0, B=1, and S=0? Draw the logic diagram for this multiplexer. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Draw the logic diagram using a software tool
